# ZPL II 2025 command support

This table is generated from the runtime command catalog. The renderer is pinned to Zebra's [current programming guide](https://docs.zebra.com/us/en/printers/software/zpl-pg/zpl-ii,-zbi-2,-set-get-do,-mirror,-wml-programming-guide.html) and [command index](https://docs.zebra.com/us/en/printers/software/zpl-pg/c-zpl-zpl-commands.html).

This profile contains **106 supported** rendering/job commands and **117 recognized non-rendering** device commands. It has no partial or unsupported entries.

Support levels in this table:

- **supported**: rendered or interpreted for the complete label-rendering profile.
- **non-rendering**: recognized printer/device behavior with no label-raster effect.

| Command | Name | Category | Effect | Scope | Status | Limitations | Zebra |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
